headline: Assessing Amgen (AMGN) Valuation As TEPEZZA And MariTide Trial Results Draw Fresh Investor Focus
summary: Why TEPEZZA and MariTide Are Back in Focus for Amgen (AMGN) Amgen (AMGN) is drawing fresh attention after Phase 3 data for subcutaneous TEPEZZA in Thyroid Eye Disease and strong weight loss results for obesity candidate MariTide reshaped expectations around its specialty and metabolic portfolios. See our latest analysis for Amgen. Amgen’s recent TEPEZZA and MariTide updates arrive during a period of solid momentum, with a 90 day share price return of 7.64% and a 1 year total shareholder...
